prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为3706→4073→6698→5409→5573名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2023年出现明显位次后移（6698名），近两年有所回升但未回到2021–2 022水平；2025年基准位次约5573名；物理类本省计划2021–2022年均为77人，2023年增至85人，2024–2025年均为87人；2026年计划94人，较2025年扩招 约8%，招生名额增加理论上使竞争略有缓解，但扩招幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流综合类大学；软科主榜2026年约第13名（2021–2025年稳定在第11–12名），近 年排名略有下降但仍稳居全国顶尖梯队，学校层次对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端、学校管理及校园安全等舆情事件，可能 对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度排名第29位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；2022–2023年曾出现多省投档线断档记录，但2025年声誉评价转为偏正面， 报考热情有所回升；拥有23个A-及以上学科，其中生态学A+、工商管理A+、马克思主义理论A、数学A、物理学A、生物学A、药学A、基础医学A、中国语言文学A 等，学科实力雄厚；临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、口腔医学A-等热门学科与招生专业高度关联，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信 、电气工程及其自动化等专业近年持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学保持推荐热度，这些专业均为中山大学物理类招生主力方向，推高整体竞争热度；河北省2026年普通高考总 人数约609800人（无分科数据），按近年物理类占比约60%估算约365880人，较2025年物理类363040人略有增加，竞争环境基本稳定；省控线方面，物理类本科批从2021年412分升 至2025年459分，呈逐年上升趋势，反映整体竞争加剧；中山大学位于广东省广州市，属华南地区顶尖高校，对华北考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在河北省物理 类招生计划约占其省外招生的一定比例，近年计划稳中有升，表明对河北生源的重视程度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5573名、2026年扩招约8%、学校层次顶尖但声誉偏负面、物理类考生规模基本持平、热门专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在5842名基础上小幅上移至约5872名，区间5372 –6372名。扩招带来的位次后移效应被热门专业竞争加剧和声誉波动部分抵消，整体竞争态势较2025年略有加剧。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 3706 → 4073 → 6698 → 5409 → 5573, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. A significant backward shift occurred in 2023 (6698), with some recovery in recent years but not returning to 2021–2022 levels. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5573. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 77 in 2021–2022, increased to 85 in 2023, and remained at 87 in 2024–2025. The 2026 plan is 94, an increase of about 8% compared to 2025, theoretically easing competition slightly, but the expansion is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. In the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, it is approximately 13th (stable at 11th–12th from 2021 to 2025), with a slight decline in recent years but still firmly in the top tier. The university's level continues to strongly attract candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct, school management, and campus safety incidents, which may inhibit some candidates' application intentions. Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. From 2022 to 2023, there were records of admission line breaks in multiple provinces, but in 2025, reputation evaluation turned somewhat positive, and application enthusiasm rebounded. It has 23 A- or above disciplines, including Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Marxist Theory A, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Basic Medicine A, Chinese Language and Literature A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength. Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Stomatology A-, and other popular disciplines are highly related to enrollment majors, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended in recent years, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain recommendation heat. These majors are all main directions for Physics Category enrollment at Sun Yat-sen University, raising overall competition heat. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Hebei Province is about 609,800 (no subject-specific data), estimated at about 365,880 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 60%, slightly higher than the 363,040 in 2025, with a basically stable competition environment. Regarding provincial control lines, the Physics Category undergraduate batch has risen from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, showing an increasing trend year by year, reflecting intensified overall competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a top university in South China, with some cross-provincial appeal to North China candidates. Its Physics Category enrollment plan in Hebei Province accounts for a certain proportion of its out-of-province enrollment, with a steady increase in recent years, indicating a high emphasis on Hebei students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5573, an enrollment expansion of about 8% in 2026, the university's top-tier level but somewhat negative reputation, basically stable Physics Category candidate numbers, and sustained high heat for popular majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift upward from 5842 to about 5872, with a range of 5372–6372. The backward shift effect from enrollment expansion is partially offset by intensified competition for popular majors and reputation fluctuations, resulting in a slightly intensified overall competition compared to 2025.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
- Electronic Information (including Communication Engineering, Microelectronics, Optoelectronics, Electronic Information Science and Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Software Engineering
- Mathematics (Zhuhai) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Aerospace (including Aerospace Engineering, Theoretical and Applied Mechanics)
- Finance (AI Dual Degree Program, Zhuhai)
- Physics (Zhuhai) (including Physics, Astronomy)
- Biological Sciences (including Biological Science, Biotechnology)
- Chemistry (including Chemistry, Polymer, Applied Chemistry)
- Biomedical Engineering (including Zhensheng Innovation Class)
- Stomatology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (Zhuhai) (including Economics, Finance)
- Clinical Medicine (Shenzhen) (including Ophthalmology Innovation Class)
- Business Administration (Guangzhou) (including Business Administration, Accounting)
- Big Data Management and Application.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5372–6372, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings better than the lower limit (<5372), focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program), Electronic Information, and Artificial Intelligence. For rankings in the middle range (5500–6000), prioritize Tier 2 majors like Stomatology, Finance (AI Dual Degree), and Aerospace. For rankings near the upper limit (>6200), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors such as Clinical Medicine (Shenzhen), Business Administration, and Big Data Management and Application as safety. Sun Yat-sen University's A+ disciplines (Business Administration, Ecology) and A disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Pharmacy, etc.) are outstanding, and candidates should consider personal interests and discipline evaluations comprehensively when applying.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 578, 1029, 556, 649, and 722 respectively. In 2022, there was a significant drop in ranking (1029), which quickly recovered to 556 in 2023, with slight declines in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 722. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 30 students in both 2021 and 2022, dropped to 22 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 21 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 18 students, a reduction of about 14.3% compared to 2025, indicating continuous contraction of enrollment quotas and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked approximately 13th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, firmly in the top tier nationally, with strong appeal to liberal arts students. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and other public opinion, which may partially suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure. In 2022, there were records of enrollment gaps in multiple provinces, but by 2025, reputation evaluation turned somewhat positive. Sun Yat-sen University has outstanding advantages in liberal arts: Business Administration A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Law A-, Philosophy A-, Sociology A-, Applied Economics A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have maintained recommendation popularity in recent years, while Teacher Training/Education fields are in a wait-and-see state of differentiation. In 2026, the total number of Hebei Province general college entrance examination takers is approximately 609,800, with an estimated 243,920 in the History Category based on the recent proportion of about 40%, roughly unchanged from 2025's 243,714. Regarding provincial control lines, the History Category undergraduate batch has risen from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025, showing an upward trend and intensified competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, a top university in South China, with strong cross-provincial appeal to liberal arts candidates in North China. The continuous reduction in History Category enrollment plans (from 30 to 18) reflects the tightening of liberal arts slots in Hebei.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 722, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 14.3%, the university's top tier, outstanding liberal arts disciplines, roughly stable History Category candidate numbers, and rising provincial control lines, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift upward from 660 to approximately 675, with a range of 598–752. The enrollment reduction makes the ranking number smaller (easier to enter), but factors such as somewhat negative reputation and rising provincial control lines partially offset the reduction effect. Overall competition is slightly eased compared to 2025, but the ranking remains higher than the 2023–2024 levels.

- History (Guangzhou).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 598–752, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit (<598) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature; those in the middle range (620–700) should primarily target Tier 2 majors such as Economics and Business Administration; those near the upper limit (>720) are advised to use Public Administration as a safety. Given Sun Yat-sen University's outstanding disciplines like Business Administration A+ and Chinese Language and Literature A, candidates should consider personal interests and disciplinary evaluations when applying.
